name: MFA Enrollment Required
description: Logical access controls require MFA to be enrolled for all human actors. An access.mfa_enrolled event must originate from a human actor.

name: MFA Must Not Be Disabled
description: Disabling MFA for any human actor is a direct control failure.

name: Production Deploy Requires Approval
description: All production deployments must carry an 'approved' flag in metadata, indicating a change-control approval was recorded.

name: Rollback Must Reference Incident
description: Any rollback event must carry an incidentId in metadata to link it to the incident management record.

name: Secrets Must Be Rotated By Service Accounts Only
description: Secret rotation must be performed by a service account (automated), not a human, to prevent manual credential exposure.

name: Secret Exposure Is Always A Failure
description: Any secret.exposed event unconditionally constitutes a control failure and must be alerted immediately.
_note: Disabled because an empty conditions array would always PASS. See verification.ts forceFailOnEmptyConditions override.

name: Audit Logs Must Not Be Tampered
description: An audit.log_tampered event is an unconditional control failure.
_note: Same as secret.exposed — handled via forceFailEventTypes in verification engine.

name: Vendor SOC 2 Report Must Be Current
description: Uploaded vendor SOC 2 reports must cover a period ending within the last 12 months. The metadata field 'reportPeriodEndYear' is checked against the current year.

name: Critical Vulnerabilities Must Be Acknowledged
description: When a vulnerability scan finds critical severity issues, the metadata must include a remediationTicket reference.

name: Infrastructure Drift Must Reference Change Request
description: Detected infrastructure drift must be linked to an approved change request via metadata.changeRequestId.
